buildCommand: if [ -f scripts/vercel-build-flutter-web.sh ]; then bash scripts/vercel-build-flutter-web.sh; elif [ -f ../scripts/vercel-build-flutter-web.sh ]; then bash ../scripts/vercel-build-flutter-web.sh; elif [ -f ../../scripts/vercel-build-flutter-web.sh ]; then bash ../../scripts/vercel-build-flutter-web.sh; else echo "Could not locate scripts/vercel-build-flutter-web.sh" && pwd && ls -la && exit 127; fi
